title: baphia massaiensis subsp. gomesii
intro: Baphia massaiensis subsp. gomesii, also known as the Gomes' baphia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its reported antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Baphia massaiensis subsp. gomesii include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, offering health benefits like pain relief and wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
